title: Professional Collaboration Game
genericDescription: Collaborate across roles; credit contributions; integrate feedback from a domain partner or peer specialist; prepare publication assets collaboratively.
specificDescription: Build a game with at least one collaborator, consultant, performer, composer, writer, artist, researcher, or external tester. Include a contribution agreement, credits, press-kit draft, five screenshots, and one short gameplay capture.
gradingRubric: 30 pts collaboration quality; 20 pts integration of partner contribution; 20 pts final game; 15 pts credits/agreement; 15 pts publication assets and retrospective.
